synthesis_brief.one_liner: Expansion intact but late-cycle compression brewing; curve inversion + real yields at crisis extremes signal regime fragility.

sample_asymmetric.loudest_bull: trend-engine: 71% of universe trending, QQQ conviction 88.7% leads broad equity rally; 8-16% upside over 8 weeks.
sample_asymmetric.loudest_bear: bond-vol: curve inversion + real yields at GFC-bottom extremes signal latent stress; -8% to -18% downside over 12 weeks.
sample_asymmetric.trade_implication: SPX is regime battleground. Fade trend-engine's bullish call on any VIX spike >20 (trend-engine's own tripwire). Long SPX only if HY OAS stays <300bps and 2s10s stays >0bps.

sample_asymmetric.loudest_bull: yield-curve: term-premium compression not recession; 2-7% upside over 8 weeks at 68% confidence.
sample_asymmetric.loudest_bear: divergence: equity-credit divergence at extremes; HY spreads signal complacency while curve inversion warns of lag; -12% to 2% downside over 8 weeks at 72% confidence.
sample_asymmetric.trade_implication: SHORT HYG is the consensus trade. 10 desks call downside. Tripwire: HY OAS >320bps triggers cascade. Position size: 3-4% of portfolio given 72% conviction from divergence desk.

today_action.primary_trade: SHORT HYG (via HYG puts, 8-week, 5% OTM) + LONG GLD (via GLD calls, 12-week, 3% OTM). HYG downside consensus from 10 desks (divergence, bond-vol, defcon, retail-edges, auction, compass, lce, risk-radar, macro-data, consumer-pulse). GLD upside from 11 desks. Ratio 2:1 (HYG short : GLD long). Position size: 4% of portfolio given MEDIUM consensus confidence.
today_action.primary_hedge: LONG TLT (via TLT calls, 8-week, 2% OTM) + SHORT DXY (via UUP puts, 12-week, 2% OTM). TLT bullish from 6 desks (systemic-stress, defcon, auction, crisis, divergence, macro-data). DXY bearish from 10 desks. Hedge ratio 1:1. Position size: 3% of portfolio.
today_action.position_sizing_note: Total portfolio allocation: 7% to primary trade (HYG short + GLD long), 3% to hedge (TLT long + DXY short). Maintain 10% cash for tripwire response (HY OAS >350bps). Avoid outright SPX longs until curve inversion resolves or HY OAS stabilizes <300bps. Reduce NVDA concentration per fundamentals desk; rotate into PEP (smart-money initiation at 16% discount) and V (three-legend cluster initiation).

loudest_tripwire.condition: HY OAS widens >350 bps from current 272 bps (78 bps move) in any single week
loudest_tripwire.action: IMMEDIATELY: Cover SHORT HYG, reduce SPX longs to 50% of target, LONG TLT 5% of portfolio, raise cash to 10%. This triggers regime flip to RISK_OFF_AGGRESSIVE. Monitor for cascade into equities (SPX -8% to -15% follow-through).

portfolio_brief.headline: Portfolio empty — immediate regime alignment impossible; build defensively into late-cycle compression.
portfolio_brief.thesis: Your book is currently a blank slate, which is both a liability and an opportunity. The desk consensus flags late-cycle compression risk (curve inversion, real yields at crisis extremes) despite medium-confidence RISK_ON positioning. HY OAS at 272 bps is the critical tripwire — a 78 bps widening in
portfolio_brief.biggest_concern: Cash drag in a RISK_ON regime with VIX in steep contango grind. Every day uninvested costs you carry in a market still biased higher, but you're exposed to whipsaw if HY breaks.

this_weeks_action.primary_trade: Buy 40% of intended equity allocation via SPY + 20% via QQQ; simultaneously buy 3-month VIX call spreads (25/30 strike) as tail hedge against HY OAS break. Size: 2–3% of portfolio notional on VIX calls.
this_weeks_action.rationale: Captures RISK_ON momentum while the desk still has medium confidence; VIX contango grind makes calls cheap. HY OAS at 272 bps is one bad data point (earnings miss, Fed hawkishness) away from 350 bps — your hedge pays 10:1 if it breaks.
this_weeks_action.if_can_only_do_one_thing: Buy SPY 60% of intended equity weight today. Defer HY and hedges until you see HY OAS action or Fed commentary this week.
